title: Hiring Store Manager at Godrej Interio

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Godrej Interio
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Interio are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Interio:
Godrej Interio is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio!
